name: lv-check-tour-availability
description: Check tour times. villageName is optional — omitted uses LEVANDE_DEFAULT_VILLAGE_NAME if set, otherwise the first village in the store. tourDate/tourTime or tourDates/tourTimes. Optional storePath.

villageName.description: Optional. Lincoln, Waratah, or Maybrook. If omitted, uses env LEVANDE_DEFAULT_VILLAGE_NAME or the first village in the store.

tourDates.description: One or more dates; same length as tourTimes. A single string is accepted as one slot (Genesys may send strings instead of JSON arrays).

tourTimes.description: One or more times; same length as tourDates. A single string is accepted as one slot.
